headline: Energy stocks rally after Trump warns of intensified Iran strikes
summary: Investing.com -- Shares in energy companies climbed on Thursday as oil and gas prices surged after President Donald Trump signaled the U.S. would press ahead with military strikes on Iran, raising fears of extended disruptions to global oil supply.

content.title: Energy stocks rally after Trump warns of intensified Iran strikes
content.summary: Investing.com -- Shares in energy companies climbed on Thursday as oil and gas prices surged after President Donald Trump signaled the U.S. would press ahead with military strikes on Iran, raising fears of extended disruptions to global oil supply.

headline: This Week In Energy Transition - Fengate Expands Solar Portfolio with Major Joint Venture
summary: Fengate Asset Management has expanded its renewable energy portfolio by acquiring a 50% interest in a 227 MWac portfolio of 12 operational solar projects across the western United States. This acquisition forms part of a joint venture with Clearway Energy Inc., enhancing Fengate's strategic focus on energy transition initiatives. Managed under the Fengate Infrastructure Yield Fund, this investment aligns with the company's objective to engage in long-term contracted renewable projects,...

Managed under the Fengate Infrastructure Yield Fund, this investment aligns with the company's objective to engage in long-term contracted renewable projects,...

headline: Chevron vs ExxonMobil: Which Energy Stock Will Win In The New Oil Landscape?
summary: Energy company Chevron (NYSE:CVX) and ExxonMobil (NYSE:XOM) both closed out full-year 2025 with record production, rising shareholder returns, and dividend increases. Oil has since surged to $104.69 per barrel, making this the right moment to ask which integrated oil giant is the better dividend stock. Record Output, But the Dividend Math Tells Two Different Stories ... Chevron vs ExxonMobil: Which Energy Stock Will Win In The New Oil Landscape?
